AI-generated personalised plan — any goal, any fitness level
3 pages of questions → Claude generates a complete personalised plan → downloads as a standalone HTML file. Supports any distance goal from 5k to marathon.

Enter a recent race result to recalibrate all training zones
Race distance
Finish time (H:MM:SS or MM:SS)
Enter a race time above to see your predicted marathon time and updated training paces.
Weekly coaching summary
AI analysis of your last 4 weeks — what the data means and what to focus on next
↻
Your coaching summary will appear here. It analyses your last 4 weeks of logged sessions, wellness data and training load, then gives you a specific coaching debrief and one focus for next week. Log at least 2 weeks of sessions first for a meaningful summary.
Calibrated training paces
Derived from your actual logged easy runs
Log easy runs with pace to see calibrated zones.
Race day simulation
Predicted finish range based on your logged sessions
Log sessions with pace to see your race projection.

AI-generated notes for each session type, based on your patterns
Generate coaching notes to see them appear on your session rows in the Full Plan view.
